name: comparative-landscape-brief
description: Produce a structured briefing document that compares a set of 3 to 8 organizations, products, or initiatives for a third-party audience (investors, board, exec team, M&A committee, partner steering group). Researches each entity, analyzes recent public messaging, runs a third-party verification pass on quantitative claims, and writes a single markdown brief with per-entity sections, cross-cutting observations, and discussion prompts ready for the meeting.
